name: Apricot Cream Cheese Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine margarine, sugar, and softened cream cheese in a bowl. Beat until well blended.
2. Add eggs, lemon juice, and lemon zest to the mixture. Mix until combined.
3. Gradually add dry ingredients (flour and baking powder) to the cream cheese mixture. Stir until just mixed.
4. Chill the dough for about 30 minutes.
5. Roll the chilled dough into a medium-sized ball. Place on an ungreased cookie sheet.
6. Flatten slightly and indent the center of the dough with your finger.
7. Fill the indentation with apricot filling.
8. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 15 minutes or until lightly golden brown.
9. Allow cookies to cool slightly, then sprinkle confectioners' sugar on top.
Apricot Filling:
1. Place 11 oz dried apricots in a saucepan and add enough water to just cover the apricots.
2. Add 1/2 cup (or to taste) sugar and bring the mixture to a boil.
3. Cover the pan and simmer for 10 minutes or until the apricots are soft and most of the liquid is absorbed.
4. Remove from heat and let cool slightly before forcing through a sieve or blending in a blender to create a smooth filling.
Makes approximately 2 cups.
